message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor
participant Dashboard
participant DashboardController
participant IssuesDetailController
participant IssuesService
participant IssuesEntityService
participant EntityService
participant IssuesRepository
participant IssueRepository

Actor -> DashboardController : /issues
DashboardController -> DashboardController : createIssues()
DashboardController --> Dashboard : new / redirect
create participant Table
Dashboard -> Table : new / redirect

par
  DashboardController -> IssuesDetailController : getIssues()
  IssuesDetailController -> IssuesService : createIssuesStatistics()
  IssuesService -> IssuesEntityService : findAll()
  IssuesEntityService -> EntityService : selectAllIssues()
  EntityService -> IssuesRepository : findAll()
  loop
    IssuesRepository -> IssuesRepository : new
    create participant Issues
    IssuesRepository --> Issues : new
    loop
      IssuesRepository -> IssueRepository : findById(id)
      IssueRepository -> IssueRepository : new
      create participant Issue
      IssueRepository --> Issue : new
      IssuesRepository <-- IssueRepository : Issue
    end
  end
  EntityService <-- IssuesRepository : Set<Issues>
  IssuesEntityService <-- EntityService : Set<Issues>
  IssuesService <-- IssuesEntityService : IssuesStatistics
  IssuesDetailController <-- IssuesService : IssuesStatistics
  DashboardController <-- IssuesDetailController : IssuesStatistics
end

Actor -> DashboardController : select report
DashboardController -> IssuesDetailController : details
DashboardController -> DashboardController : new / redirect
create participant Details
Dashboard -> Details : new / redirect

par
  DashboardController -> IssuesDetailController : getCategories(origin, reference)
  IssuesDetailController -> IssuesService : createDistributionByCategory(origin, reference)
  IssuesService -> IssuesEntityService : findByPrimaryKey(origin, reference)
  IssuesEntityService -> EntityService : select(origin, reference)
  EntityService -> IssuesRepository : findById(origin, reference)
  IssuesRepository -> IssuesRepository : new
  IssuesRepository --> Issues : new
  loop
    IssuesRepository -> IssueRepository : findById(id)
    IssueRepository -> IssueRepository : new
    IssueRepository --> Issue : new
    IssuesRepository <-- IssueRepository : Issue
  end
  EntityService <-- IssuesRepository : Issues
  IssuesEntityService <-- EntityService : Issues
  IssuesService <-- IssuesEntityService : Issues
  IssuesDetailController <-- IssuesService : IssuePropertyDistribution
  DashboardController <-- IssuesDetailController : IssuePropertyDistribution
end

@enduml
